title: Slow Endpoint Incident
description: A GET /api/orders endpoint is responding in 8-12 seconds instead of expected 200ms. Production is affected. Student must diagnose and respond.
npc: Team Lead — calm, expects methodical diagnosis, needs a status update for the CEO

system_context.recent_changes: Deployed new filtering feature 2 hours ago
system_context.logs: Query taking 7-9s: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id=? AND status=? ORDER BY created_at DESC

root_cause: Missing composite index on (user_id, status, created_at). New filter added without index.
trap: Student might rollback the deployment — wrong move, the query logic is correct, just missing index
